overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character travels along a winding path, passes other figures, and traverses from a cliffside trail to an open valley and into a darker rocky corridor.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy cliffside path toward a group of figures ahead

notable_agents.action: group of 2-3 figures walking ahead on the path, gradually approaching

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising on the right side of the path
narrow winding trail covered in snow and ice cutting through the mountain
snow-capped mountains visible in the distance against the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path hugging a cliff wall on the right. The night sky is partially visible above, with distant mountains silhouetted against the darkness ahead. A small group of figures walks ahead on the same path.

events.description: path opens from narrow cliffside to wide valley view with distant settlement lights visible

agents.ego_description: passing the group of figures while continuing along the widening path with expansive views

notable_agents.action: figures standing or walking slowly as the ego character passes them on the right

entered.detail: wide open valley covered in snow dropping away to reveal expansive terrain below
faint warm lights from a distant settlement visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The path opens dramatically to reveal a wide snowy valley below with distant lights twinkling in the darkness. The character passes the group of figures on the left as the cliff wall recedes behind, replaced by an expansive view of the mountain range ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field on mountain slope

events.description: path curves to the right as the terrain descends slightly toward rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: traversing the open snowy slope alone with no other people in sight

entered.detail: dark jagged rock formations emerging from the snow on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues through open snow-covered terrain with distant mountains surrounding the area. Dark rock outcrops appear on the right as the path curves, and the distant valley lights fade from view behind.

events.description: entering darker rocky corridor with high walls blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow rocky passage with reduced visibility

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of a narrow mountain passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of a narrow mountain passage

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a narrow, dark rocky corridor with high walls on both sides blocking most of the sky. The path continues winding through the enclosed mountain pass with only the snowy ground visible in the dim light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restrictive cliffside trail into a vast mountain valley before closing into a dark rocky corridor. It begins with the character walking along a narrow snowy path hugging a cliff wall, following a small group of figures toward silhouetted mountains under a night sky. As the path opens dramatically, the cliff wall recedes to reveal an expansive snowy valley with twinkling distant lights, and the camera passes the group of figures to embrace the wide mountain range. The scene then shifts across open snow-covered terrain where the valley lights fade from view and dark rock outcrops begin to emerge on the right. Finally, the environment narrows into a dim, enclosed mountain pass with high rocky walls on both sides that block the sky, leaving only the snowy ground visible.
